evals.name: mixed-batch
evals.prompt: Just pushed: `feat(auth): add OAuth2 login with Google`. Also updated the existing UserService to support OAuth user creation alongside password users. Assume docs/ contains a node called `user-service.md` documenting the UserService.
evals.expected_output: Triage searches docs/ and finds user-service.md as existing (→ sync). OAuth2 login is new (→ capture). Both classified with topology hints: user-service.md gets Connected/Tags output; OAuth item gets Suggested relations pointing at user-service.md.

assertions.description: user-service.md (or equivalent) is classified as Existing (→ sync)
OAuth2 login is classified as New (→ capture)
Existing node includes Connected/Tags topology hints
New item includes Suggested relations (even if none found)
Output uses the Autology — Triage Results blockquote format with Existing and New sections

evals.name: all-new-items
evals.prompt: Just pushed first commit for a new service: `feat(queue): add BullMQ job queue for background email sending`. No existing docs/ nodes relate to queues or email.
evals.expected_output: Triage searches docs/, finds no matches, uses the empty-state format. All items classified as New (→ capture). Suggested relations section present even if empty.

assertions.description: Uses the 'No existing matches found. All items classified as new.' empty-state format
No Existing (→ sync) section present, or it is explicitly empty
BullMQ queue and/or email sending is listed under New (→ capture)
Each new item has a Suggested relations line (can be 'none')

evals.name: topology-hints-depth
evals.prompt: We just changed how the session-start hook works: it now reads the skill file path from an environment variable instead of computing it from BASH_SOURCE. Assume docs/ has: shell-hook-scripts.md (which wikilinks to autology-internals.md and codeless-architecture-decision.md).
evals.expected_output: Triage finds shell-hook-scripts.md as Existing. Topology hints include its wikilink connections (autology-internals, codeless-architecture-decision) and any shared-tag nodes. Connected nodes listed so sync knows what to check.

assertions.description: Connected nodes (autology-internals, codeless-architecture-decision) appear in topology hints
Hub/orphan status or link count included in topology output
